revision.comment: Category: Aarne-Thompson Grouping
revision.text: [[Category:Aarne-Thompson Grouping]]

revision.comment: /* top */Explain category
revision.text:
'''ATU 400-459''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural or Enchanted Husband (Wife) or Other Relatives'' range.
[[Category:Aarne-Thompson Grouping]]

revision.comment: Template containing similar/same list
revision.text: '''ATU 400-459''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural or Enchanted Husband (Wife) or Other Relatives'' range. ==Related listings== {{Animal as Bridegroom|state=collapsed}} [[Category:Aarne-Thompson Grouping]]

revision.comment: Commonscat template.
/* top */ Commonscat “ATU 400-459” refers the reader to “ATU 400-459: Supernatural or Enchanted Wife (Husband) or Other Relative”
5 revisions imported

Copying from [[Category:Commons category link is locally defined]] to [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Aarne-Thompson Grouping]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "==" to " [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] "
revision.text:
{{Commonscat|ATU 400-459: Supernatural or Enchanted Wife (Husband) or Other Relative}}
'''ATU 400-459''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[:en:Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index|Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural or Enchanted Husband (Wife) or Other Relatives'' range.
[[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] Related listings [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]]
{{Animal as Bridegroom|state=collapsed}}
{{draft categories|
[[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] }} [[en:ATU 400-459]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]]
[[en:Category:ATU 400-459]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Commonscat|ATU 400-459: Supernatural or Enchanted Wife (Husband) or Other Relative}} '''ATU 400-459''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[:en:Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index|Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural or Enchanted Husband (Wife) or Other Relatives'' range.
Related listings
{{Animal as Bridegroom|state=collapsed}}
